title: Legacy Skins Pack Ordering
description: Fixes pack ordering with Legacy Skins
body:
**Legacy Skins Pack Ordering** is a pack that sorts skin packs that are a part of the [Skin Packs collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/bJ8YVFtd).

This pack might also contain a few skin packs of its own!

![The sorted packs, in order of Doctor Who: Companions, Doctor Who: The Doctor(s), The Garden Awakens (which is selected), 3rd Birthday, 2nd Birthday, and 2nd Birthday - PS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3ikLYLCy/images/15e7a14723acd321cb802ad84ace073a9fd9e4b8.png)
